title: Vanilla Create (Stam1o S3 Modpack)
description: Fabric based lightweight vanilla+ pack focused around vanilla but includes the create mod and limited addons to add to the vanilla experience.
body: # **Stam1o Presents:** Vanilla Create is a Minecraft modpack that centers around the **vanilla experience**, with one outlier, **The Create Mod**. Curated by Stam1o, this lightweight, Fabric-based pack for Minecraft 1.20.1 strips away excess mods and focuses on the core of Minecraft, the vanilla game. Wether you're looking to build intricate contraptions, explore automation, or simply add mechanical life to your world, this pack keeps the experience simple and true to Minecraft's core. With Cerate, you can build anything from functional machinery to grand, moving structures like trains, windmills or even complex factories, all within the familiar Minecraft aestethic. Unlike heavier packs, Vanilla Create is focused purely on enriching the vanilla gameplay without overwhelming your world. The only additional mods are small quality-of-life enhancements that complement the gameplay, keeping things lightweight and accessible. ## Main mods are: - Create - Create Deco - Create Copycats (Only the Create Blocks) - Farmer's Delight - Amendments - Copper and Tuff Backport - Decorative Blocks - EMI - A few performance mods Once mods become available for 1.21 there are plans to update the pack. (No guarantee older worlds will work with updated versions of the pack.) ## [![Nodecraft Sponsorship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef67704ea76bfadc1a950915755dcb1b72300e24.jpeg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/stam1o) ## *All mods are the property of their respective owners, massive thank you to them, without them all of this wouldn't be possible! Special thanks to oude_henky and BackupCup for helping with the pack.
